candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A line, but it appears at the same level as broader operating expense buckets rather than as a cost-of-sales subline under the selected COGS row 'Materials and services'. No explicit indication it belongs to COGS.
Component of operating D&A, but not labelled as related to cost of sales or materials/services.
Component of operating D&A, but not labelled as related to cost of sales or materials/services.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and services'. The visible D&A lines are separate operating lines and do not appear to be COGS-specific or nested under the selected COGS row, so no COGS D&A row should be added separately.

candidates.why: Separate same-level operating expense line outside the selected XSGA bucket ('Employee benefit expenses' + 'Other operating expenses'), so some D&A should be added separately to XSGA rather than treated as embedded. However, this row appears larger than the sum of the explicit D&A components above EBIT, suggesting it may also absorb impairment and is therefore less clean for a pure D&A add-back.
Explicit operating amortization component above the financial section. Appears separate from the selected XSGA rows and suitable to add separately as part of overhead D&A.
Explicit operating depreciation component above the financial section. Appears separate from the selected XSGA rows and suitable to add separately as part of overhead D&A.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating depreciation component above the financial section. Although not in the preferred shortlist, it is part of operating D&A and sits separately from the selected XSGA rows.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is 'Employee benefit expenses' plus 'Other operating expenses'. The statement shows D&A as separate operating line items at the same hierarchy level, so they are not already embedded in the selected XSGA rows and should be added separately. I used the explicit D&A component rows above the financial section instead of the broader row 'Depreciation and amortisations' because that broader row appears to exceed the pure D&A components and likely also includes impairment, which must be excluded.
